question.label: Week four check-in
question.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Aisha?
question.description: Safe opener that lets Aisha choose the most relevant thread before any friction is introduced.

answer: I am settling in, but I still feel like I am learning the unwritten rules in every meeting.

assessment.note: She is still decoding 'unwritten rules in every meeting,' which signals mild strain and unclear norms; concrete thread is the 'unwritten rules'.

new_queue.label: Unwritten rules
new_queue.name: When you say 'unwritten rules,' what are you still having to decode?

new_queue.label: Decision rights map
new_queue.name: Where are decision rights still fuzzy for you in the work you're doing?

new_queue.label: Alignment pressure
new_queue.name: What part of cross-functional alignment is taking more energy than it should?

new_queue.label: Consensus trap
new_queue.name: Where are you still waiting for consensus when you probably need a decision?

new_queue.label: Partner expectations
new_queue.name: Which partner expectation feels hardest to read right now?

new_queue.label: Support from me
new_queue.name: What would make my support more useful for you this month?

new_queue.label: Next decision
new_queue.name: What's the next decision you want to have made by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I am settling in, but I still feel like I am learning the unwritten rules in every meeting.
I am settling in, but I still feel like I am learning the unwritten rules in every meeting.
